# AI Image Generator

> A production-oriented AI image generation web app with text-to-image and image-to-image workflows, powered by DashScope, Google Gemini, and Volcengine (Jimeng).

## Overview

This is a Node.js/Express web application that provides a unified interface for generating AI images across multiple providers. It supports both text-to-image (generate images from text prompts) and image-to-image (transform reference images) workflows.

## Tech Stack

- **Backend**: Node.js + Express (no build step, no TypeScript)
- **Frontend**: Bootstrap 5 + vanilla JavaScript (single-page app)
- **Providers**: DashScope (Alibaba Cloud), Google Gemini, Volcengine Jimeng

## Key Features

- Multi-provider switching with model-specific constraints
- DashScope sync/async protocol handling
- Volcengine HMAC-SHA256 signed requests
- Client-side image compression for uploads
- Optional API key input or server-side `.env` fallback
- CORS allowlist, rate limiting, and optional frontend access control

## Quick Start

```bash
npm install
cp .env.example .env   # configure at least one provider API key
npm run dev             # starts on http://localhost:3000
```

## API Endpoints

- `POST /api/generate-image` — Text-to-image generation
- `POST /api/image-to-image` — Image-to-image transformation
- `POST /api/access-auth` — Frontend access control authentication
- `POST /api/access-logout` — Clear auth session

## Supported Models

### DashScope
wan2.7-image-pro, wan2.7-image, wan2.6-image, wan2.6-t2i, wan2.5-t2i-preview, wan2.2-t2i-flash, wan2.2-t2i-plus, wanx2.1-t2i-turbo, wanx2.1-t2i-plus, wanx2.0-t2i-turbo, qwen-image-2.0-pro, qwen-image-2.0, qwen-image-max, qwen-image-plus, qwen-image, z-image-turbo

### Gemini
gemini-2.5-flash-image

### Volcengine Jimeng
jimeng-3.0, jimeng-3.1, jimeng-4.0, jimeng-4.6, jimeng-3.0-i2i, jimeng-material-product, jimeng-material-pod, jimeng-upscale, jimeng-inpainting
